name: Capability Context Loader
description: A deterministic capability-result reader that turns result_package outputs into an auditable context_package with source refs, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Result Package
inputSchema.description: Capability result_package from an Action, Tool, or Subgraph.

inputSchema.name: Run ID
inputSchema.description: Optional graph run id that stores the result package in state_values.

inputSchema.name: State Key
inputSchema.description: Optional state key where the result package is stored.

outputSchema.name: Capability Context Report
outputSchema.description: Capability source, output refs, budget, and warnings.
